headline: WEC Energy Group declares quarterly dividend
summary: The board of directors of WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) today declared a quarterly cash dividend of 95.25 cents per share on the company's common stock.

raw.headline: WEC Energy Group declares quarterly dividend
raw.summary: The board of directors of WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) today declared a quarterly cash dividend of 95.25 cents per share on the company's common stock.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on WEC Energy Group, Raises Price Target to $122
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) with a Hold and raises the price target from $119 to $122.
